name: Anyscale Endpoints
description: Registers Anyscale Endpoints as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Anyscale API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Anyscale API key
settings.description: Anyscale API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to ANYSCALE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Anyscale Endpoints
providers.description: Refreshes Anyscale Endpoints OpenAI-compatible chat models from the upstream /v1/models catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
